title: Volume of spheres
description: Practice applying the volume formulas for spheres.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Find the volume of the sphere.**  
*Either enter an exact answer in terms of $\pi$ or use $3.14$ for $\pi$ and round your final answer to the nearest hundredth.*


[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ expression 1]] units$^3$
hints:
The volume of the sphere is $\dfrac{4}{3}\pi$ units$^3$.

*(Note that we could also multiply $\dfrac{4}{3}$ by $3.14$ and round our answer to the nearest hundredth to get $4.19$ units$^3$.)*

options.alt: A sphere. The radius is 1 unit.

assessment_items.question_content:

*Either enter an exact answer in terms of $\pi$ or use $\dfrac{22}{7}$ for $\pi$.*

hints:

*(Note that we could also multiply $\dfrac{1}{6}$ by $\dfrac{22}{7}$  to get $\dfrac{11}{21}$ units$^3$.)*
